Stori

AI Visual Story Creator

user@email.com
Free
API Key (Free) Not set
API Key (Paid) Not set
Projects saved 0

Turn Your Voice into Illustrated Videos

Speak it, type it, or upload a podcast — Stori generates unique AI visuals for every scene and assembles a ready-to-post video. No stock footage. No design skills. Every image made for your story.

Recent Projects

How It Works

1
🎤

Tell Your Story

Upload audio, import a podcast, or type your script. Any voice, any language.

2
🎨

AI Illustrates

AI listens to your words and creates unique visuals for every scene — matching your chosen style.

3
🎬

Edit & Export

Fine-tune in the visual editor with transitions, text, and music. Export HD video for any platform.

What You Can Create

📖
Illustrated Stories
Bedtime tales, mythology, fiction — narrate and watch AI bring scenes to life
🎓
Educational Content
Explainers, science topics, history — visuals generated from your lesson
🎙️
Podcast Videos
Turn audio podcasts into visual episodes with chapters and speaker overlay
📱
Social Media Content
Reels, Shorts, TikToks — vertical or horizontal, any platform
📢
Marketing Videos
Product demos, brand stories, testimonials — professional visuals from a script
🌍
Multi-Language Content
One story, seven languages — AI translates and generates voiceover automatically

Why Stori

🎨
Every Image Is Unique
No stock footage. AI generates original visuals that match your exact content.
🖼️
20 Visual Styles
Watercolor, cinematic, anime, pixel art, noir — pick a style, AI does the rest
⚡
Minutes, Not Hours
Go from audio to finished video in under 15 minutes
🔒
100% Private
Everything runs in your browser. Your content never touches our servers.
✨
Full Visual Editor
5 timeline tracks, transitions, Ken Burns motion, frame overlay, logo, subtitles
💰
Free to Start
Bring your own API key. No subscription needed to create your first story.

Pricing

Free

$0

Bring your own API key

  • 5 templates, 5 visual styles
  • Up to 1 min export at 720p
  • Basic audio editor (trim)
  • 3 output sizes
  • 3 saved projects
  • Stori watermark

Pro

$10/mo

Everything unlocked

  • All 40 templates & 20 styles
  • Up to 30 min export at 1080p
  • Podcast pipeline with PiP
  • Multi-language voiceover (7 languages)
  • Full audio editor, BGM, transitions
  • Unlimited projects, no watermark

✨ Create Content

1 Gemini API Key

No credit card needed. Slower image generation (2/min).

Higher quality images + faster generation (~$0.04/image).

Get key from aistudio.google.com. Paid: enable billing on your project.

2 Input

Import an audio file (podcast, voiceover, recording)

Import a podcast recording. Audio-only or video (audio extracted + video becomes PiP speaker overlay).

✂ Edit Audio
0:00.000 Click and drag to select a region 0:00.000
🔇 Remove Silence

3 Template & Output Size

Pick a template to auto-configure style and size, or choose Blank for full control.

4 Transcribe Audio

Processing...

5 Chapter Splitting

Split your podcast into chapters. Each chapter will get its own set of images in the storyboard.

Set chapter timestamps and titles below.

6 Storyboard — Image Prompts

Review the AI-generated scene prompts below. Each prompt corresponds to a segment of your audio and will determine the image placed at that time on the photo timeline. Edit any prompt before generating images.

🎨 Visual Style (applied to all scenes)

Tamil/Indian scripts don't render well in AI images
Happy with prompts? Proceed to next step →

7 Visual References (optional)

Define characters and environments to maintain visual consistency across scenes. Upload illustrations or describe them — AI will use these as reference when generating images.

Characters 0/3
Environments 0/3
Scene Assignments

Tick characters per scene (1st tick = main, 2nd = supporting). Select one environment. AI will intelligently include only relevant characters based on the scene text.

8 Generate Scene Images

Generating...

9 Multi-Language Voiceover (optional)

Your primary audio is shown below. Add more languages — same images, different audio for each.

Add languages:

10 Review & Send to Editor

Review the generated images above. Edit prompts and regenerate any you want to change, then send everything to the editor.

🎵 Audio Track No audio
0:00.000 Import audio to get started, or add photos & text first 0:00.000

🔇 Silence Removal — removes pauses longer than the minimum duration

Full timeline
Media Timeline 0 items
🎵 BGM No file 30%
🎭 PiP Speaker No video
🎬 Video Mode: Style: Duration: PiP corner:
🖼️ Frame Library:
Padding:
⭐ Logo Library:
🎬 Video Trim
Video Timeline 0 videos
🎬 Video Clip
Video Trim
Text Timeline 0 texts
Subtitle Timeline 0 subtitles

Exporting...
